Download
5.0 Rating on App Store

The right supplement, perfectly timed.

You spend a fortune on supplements. Don't let them go to waste by mixing the wrong ones or forgetting a dose. Maximize your absorption with science-backed timing and smart interaction alerts.

Download on the App Store
Science-based timing
On-device privacy
Works with Apple Health
Science-based timing
Why SuppTime

Right pill.
Right time.

Most supplements only work when you time them right. SuppTime tells you exactly when — and reminds you to follow through.

Smart Interaction Alerts

Stop flushing your vitamins down the drain. SuppTime warns you instantly if supplements compete (like iron and calcium) or block absorption.

Expert Stacks & Timing

Explore 40+ supplements with expert timing recommendations. Use preset stacks for immunity, focus, or sleep—designed for maximum bio-availability.

Medication & Rx Support

Never confuse your medical treatment with your daily nutrition. Track prescription medications alongside your vitamin stack with dedicated Rx badges.

Wrist Control & 100% Private

Log your doses without opening your phone. No accounts, no servers, no tracking—your health data stays completely private on your iCloud.

App Store

Built around your routine.

Four screens. Four ways SuppTime keeps your stack working its hardest.

On your wrist

SuppTime on your wrist.

The perfect companion for your health routine. Get gentle taps on your wrist and log doses in a second.

  • Standalone Watch App
  • Syncs with iPhone
  • One-tap logging
  • Works with Apple Health
Loved worldwide

Trusted by people
who actually take their vitamins.

Real reviews from real users across 60+ countries.

🇰🇷
김지윤
Wellness coach

아침 비타민 D를 빵 먹기 전에 먹으면 흡수가 안 된다는 걸 처음 알려준 앱이에요. 한 달 만에 컨디션이 달라졌어요.

KOREA
🇹🇷
Mehmet Yıldız
Yazılım mühendisi

B12 ve C vitaminini birlikte alıyordum, SuppTime "ikisini 2 saat ayır" dedi. Yorgunluğum 10 günde gitti. Watch hatırlatması harika.

TURKEY
🇩🇪
Lukas Brandt
Triathlet

Endlich eine App, die D3 mit K2 koppelt und Magnesium am Abend timt. Schlaf-Score seit 4 Wochen konstant grün.

GERMANY
🇯🇵
佐藤 美咲
管理栄養士

鉄分とカルシウムの相互作用まで知らせてくれる。患者さんに勧めるアプリ第一候補になりました。

JAPAN
🇧🇷
Camila Ribeiro
Nutricionista

Indiquei para 30+ pacientes. A aderência à suplementação subiu de 50% para 90% em duas semanas. Sério.

BRAZIL
🇪🇸
Sofía Navarro
Médico de familia

La detección de conflictos entre suplementos es lo mejor. Mis pacientes mayores por fin entienden cuándo tomar cada cosa.

SPAIN
🇮🇩
Andi Pratama
Personal trainer

Creatine pagi, magnesium malam, semua diatur otomatis. Recovery saya naik drastis. Watch reminder = game changer.

Биохакер

Перепробовал 6 приложений. SuppTime — единственное, где синергии и конфликты работают по-настоящему. Подписка стоит каждой копейки.

Common Questions

Is my health data really private?

Yes. SuppTime has no servers. Your data is stored only on your iPhone and synced via your personal iCloud. We can't see it, and no one else can either.

How does the interaction engine work?

It uses a database of 40+ common supplements. If you try to log two that shouldn't be taken together (like Iron and Calcium), the app warns you instantly to protect your absorption.

Do I need an internet connection?

No. SuppTime works 100% offline. You can log doses and check interactions even in flight mode or remote areas.

Can I cancel my trial anytime?

Absolutely. Subscriptions are managed directly by Apple. You can cancel with one tap in your iPhone settings at any time.

Subscribe safely with Apple.

Full access to every feature. Secure payments via App Store.

Lifetime or Subscription
Apple Watch + iPhone
Secure payment
Download on the App Store
Requires iOS 26 · watchOS 10
SuppTime
Your wellness, timed to perfection.
